description: The Set Global Transform node sets the input slot's position, rotation and scale to the provided values in global coordinate space.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Sets the Instance slot's global transform when an impulse is received.
fields.Instance: The slot whose global transform is set. Default is null, the node does not function without this input.
fields.Position: The global position the input Instance slot is set to. Default is [0;0;0].
fields.Rotation: The global rotation the input Instance slot is set to. Default is [0;0;0].
fields.Scale: The global scale the input Instance slot is set to. Default is [1;1;1].
fields.Next: An impulse is fired whenever the Instance slot's transform is set after the node receives an impulse. No impulse is fired from this output if the Instance input is null.
